summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Gostaylo partner application workflow - backend APIs (13/13 tests pass) and frontend UI verified working correctly

integration_issues.issue: 502 errors from preview environment - intermittent timeout issues with external URL
integration_issues.note: Local development server (localhost:3000) works correctly - this appears to be a preview environment infrastructure issue

action_items: Preview environment 502 errors may need infrastructure investigation - local server works fine
critical_code_review_comments: Session cookie has 'Secure' flag set - correct for production HTTPS but requires manual cookie handling for local HTTP testing
Email is stored lowercase in DB but test code was comparing with original case - fixed in test file
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users with prefix TEST_ created during testing - stored in profiles and partner_applications tables
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend partner application APIs fully tested: POST /api/v2/partner/apply, GET /api/v2/admin/partners, POST /api/v2/admin/partners (approve/reject), GET /api/v2/partner/application-status. Frontend profile page shows 'Become a Partner' button for RENTER users, admin partners page lists pending applications with approve/reject buttons. All flows working correctly.

backend: POST /api/v2/partner/apply - creates application in partner_applications table with PENDING status
GET /api/v2/admin/partners - returns pending applications (admin-only, 403 for non-admins)
POST /api/v2/admin/partners action=approve - updates status to APPROVED, changes user role to PARTNER
POST /api/v2/admin/partners action=reject - updates status to REJECTED with reason
frontend: /profile page shows 'Become a Partner' CTA for RENTER users
/profile page shows 'Заявка на рассмотрении' status for PENDING applications
/admin/partners page lists pending applications for admin users
/admin/partners page has Одобрить (Approve) and Отклонить (Reject) action buttons
